title: MDCAT Format Snapshot
questionStyle: Mostly concept-based MCQs with science-heavy preparation.
bestStrategy: Master textbook concepts first, then practise timed topic MCQs and weekly science mocks.

title: FAST NUCES Format Snapshot
questionStyle: Speed-focused quantitative and reasoning questions with strong mathematics demand.
bestStrategy: Practise arithmetic speed, algebra, percentages, arrangements and IQ patterns daily.

title: NUST NET Format Snapshot
questionStyle: Subject-heavy test with a separate intelligence component.
bestStrategy: Revise formulas, solve subject MCQs and keep a daily IQ practice slot.

title: NAT Format Snapshot
questionStyle: Balanced aptitude test with verbal, quantitative and analytical sections.
bestStrategy: Use mixed practice daily and revise common vocabulary, grammar and math basics.

title: GAT General Format Snapshot
questionStyle: Graduate-level aptitude test focused on reasoning and problem solving.
bestStrategy: Build accuracy first, then improve timing through weekly full-pattern mocks.

title: LAT Format Snapshot
questionStyle: Law admission route combining English, awareness, reasoning and writing.
bestStrategy: Practise grammar, short essays, legal reasoning and general knowledge together.

title: IELTS Format Snapshot
questionStyle: English proficiency test based on language performance and band descriptors.
bestStrategy: Practise reading and writing with feedback, then add speaking fluency and listening accuracy.

title: SAT Format Snapshot
questionStyle: International aptitude test with evidence-based reading, grammar and math.
bestStrategy: Alternate English and math practice, review mistakes and build timed accuracy.
